I

inputEmbeddingAmount - Variable in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
The amount of embeddings that are allowed to be inserted.
inputEmbeddingSize - Variable in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
The vector dimension (size) that each inserted embedding must have
insertInput(List<Double>) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.mlp.FFNetwork
Inserts input activations into the network
insertInput(List<Double>) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.Network
 
insertInput(List<Double>) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.DecoderTransformer
 
insertInput(List<Double>) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.S2STransformer
 
insertInput(Sequence...) - Methode in Klasse me.damoebe.architectures.transformer.mha.Head
Generates an output for one input embedding list, regarding the decoder head attention rules.
